strengths: The agent demonstrated excellent policy compliance, adhering to all relevant banking policies throughout the call.
The agent provided clear and concise communication, ensuring the customer understood the solution and next steps.
The agent took proactive action to resolve the issue, raising a payment trace request to resolve the customer's concern.
improvements: Consider providing more detailed explanations of banking policies and procedures to help customers understand the reasoning behind the solution.
In the future, try to anticipate and address potential customer concerns or questions before they are asked.
When providing next steps, consider including a specific timeline or deadline for the customer to expect a resolution.

rephrasing.original: The receiving bank will contact you directly to resolve the issue.
rephrasing.better: We've raised a payment trace request, and the receiving bank will be in touch with you within the next 3-5 business days to resolve this matter. In the meantime, if you have any further questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to reach out to us.
